lossBuckets.label: Counter-momentum entries
lossBuckets.fix: Require momentum alignment for core entries or add a momentum veto when it conflicts.

lossBuckets.label: High entry price (expensive contracts)
lossBuckets.reason: Entry price was high, reducing payout asymmetry.
lossBuckets.fix: Tighten maxEntryPrice or require stronger edge before paying up.

lossBuckets.label: Low confidence
lossBuckets.fix: Raise minConfidence or increase edge threshold.

lossBuckets.label: Weak move / low z-score
lossBuckets.reason: Underlying move was small relative to recent volatility.
lossBuckets.fix: Add a minZ or minMove filter for these entries.

lossBuckets.label: Thin edge
lossBuckets.reason: Estimated edge was small at entry time.
lossBuckets.fix: Increase edge threshold or require tighter spreads / deeper books.

lossBuckets.label: Other / noise
lossBuckets.reason: Loss not captured by a dominant heuristic.
lossBuckets.fix: Consider time-based confirmation or reduce size in choppy regimes.

winBuckets.label: Momentum-aligned wins
winBuckets.reason: Signal moved with the 5m momentum direction.
winBuckets.fix: Prioritize momentum alignment for higher conviction entries.

winBuckets.label: Low entry price (cheap contracts)
winBuckets.reason: Lower entry price improved payout asymmetry.
winBuckets.fix: Keep maxEntryPrice conservative to preserve payoff skew.

winBuckets.label: High confidence
winBuckets.reason: Confidence was in the top band.
winBuckets.fix: Scale up entries that clear the high-confidence band.

winBuckets.label: Strong move / high z-score
winBuckets.reason: Underlying move was large relative to volatility.
winBuckets.fix: Emphasize high z-score moves when liquidity is healthy.

winBuckets.label: Other / noise
winBuckets.reason: Win not captured by a dominant heuristic.
winBuckets.fix: Track these cases; may suggest new buckets or regime cues.
